english: bló (blo) a mind, directed towards what is good, honesty, probity Glr. - bsam-sbyór (bsam sbyor) design, device, project Mil., bzáṅ-po (bzang po), ṅán-pa (ngan pa); bsam-byór byéd-pa (bsam byor byed pa) to plan, to scheme, to project a plan C. - bsam-śés (bsam shes) consciousness, *sam-śé ṅém-pa* (*sam she ngem pa*) C. bad conscience (?).
to mend, repair, put in order Sch.
1. = gsír-ba (gsir ba). - 2. W. to sip, *sir-te tuṅ* (*sir te tung*) he drinks sipping.

I. adj. and sbst. cool, the cool (of the day), coolness, káṅ-pa bsíl-ba żíg (khang pa bsil ba zhig) a cool house Dzl., bsíl-ba ṗán (bsil ba phan) coolness is wholesome Lt., tsá-ba bsíl-bur _°gyúr (tsa ba bsil bur 'gyur) the heat changes to coolness Dzl.; bsíl (bsil) id., *sil-la dod* (*sil la dod*) sit down in the shade W., lcáṅ-bsíl (lcang bsil) 'willow-shade', shady place under willow-trees; bsíl - żiṅ gráṅ-ba (bsil zhing grang ba) cold Dzl., Glr.; bsíl-mo (bsil mo) id., *sil-mo pi-la* (*sil mo pi la*) W for the sake of coolness. II. vb., to cool, resp. for _°khrúd-pa ('khrud pa) to wash, żál (zhal) mouth and face, żábs (zhabs) the feet, żábs-bsil (zhabs bsil) water for washing the feet Cs.; even: čú drón-mos sku bsíl-bar mdzád-pa (chu dron mos sku bsil bar mdzad pa) to wash the body with warm water Cs.; to shed, spyan-čáb máṅ-po (spyan chab mang po) many tears Mil. Comp. bsíl-kaṅ (bsil khang) a cool room, a summer-house, summer-residence Stg. - bsíl-grib (bsil grib) cool shade Cs. - bsíl-túṅ (bsil btung) a cooling drink or beverage Sch. - bsíl-gdúgs (bsil gdugs) parasol Do. - bsíl-bu (bsil bu) coolness (?); bsíl-bui rluṅ (bsil bu'i rlung) a cool breeze Cs. - bsíl-smán (bsil sman) a cooling medicine. - bsíl-zás (bsil zas) cooling food. - bsíl-yáb (bsil yab) a fan.

pf. and imp. bsus (bsus), to go to meet, ma bubsur _°oṅ (ma bu bsur 'ong) the mother goes to meet her son Dzl. (usually with accus. as in the preceding case, col. also with dat.); bsus śíg (bsus shig) let him come to meet me Thgr.; to join, of two armies, generals, kings Dzl.; to make advances, to interest one's self for; most frq.: to go to meet (solemnly), to welcome a respected person, ṗo-bráṅ-gi náṅ-du (pho brang gi nang du) into the castle Dzl.; páṇ-ḍi-ta _°byón-pa-la bsú-ba byéd-do (paN Di ta 'byon pa la bsu ba byed do) I will go to meet the arriving Pandit Glr.; bsú-ba rgya-čén-po (bsu ba rgya chen po) very great festivities of reception Pth.; bág-mar bsú-ba yin (bag mar bsu ba yin) we will lead her home as your bride Mil.; gdóṅ-bsu ba (gdong bsu ba) = bsú-ba (bsu ba) Mil.; *dan sú-ce* (*dan su ce*) W. for: dan- (dan-) or spyan-_°dren-pa (spyan 'dren pa) of B. -- *su-kyel* (*su kyel*) or *kyal* (*kyal*) W. reception and conduct of honour.

smell, esp. sweet scent Dzl.; dri-bsúṅ (dri bsung) id.; dri-bsúṅ żím-pa broo (dri bsung zhim pa bro'o) it is sweet, scented, fragrant Dzl.; bsuṅ-ṅád (bsung ngad) Sch. fragrance; ro bsúṅ-ba (ro bsung ba) filled with a cadaverous smell Dzl.; *mar suṅ soṅ dog* (*mar sung song dog*) W. the butter smells (rancid).
Sch.: irregularity of life, dissoluteness; bsún-par byéd-pa (bsun par byed pa) Sch.: to be dissolute; to be dirty; bsún-tsam (bsun tsam) disgusting, obscene Sch.

1. v. se (se), se-ba (se ba), se-dri (se dri), se-śíṅ (se shing). - 2. also: bse-kó (bse ko), tanned leather, bse-kráb (bse khrab) Lex. a coat of mail made of leather; bse-sgám (bse sgam), bsei sgróm-bu (bse'i sgrom bu) Pth. leather-box, or a box covered with leather; bse-sgó (bse sgo) leather-door, or a door-like target made of hides Pth. - 3. bse (bse) or bse-ru (bse ru) (Lex. 'a certain animal') unicorn, Hook. II., 157 'tshiru', an antelope, prob. = gtsod (gtsod); rhinoceros Tar. 185, 20.
Sch. to come from one side, to come across one's way.
Sch. the bow for setting a drill in motion.

1. a fresh, cold breeze, bsér-gyis ṗog (bser gyis phog) he is exposed to a cold wind Sch. - 2 of persons, resp. the feeling cold, catching cold, bsér-du yoṅ (bser du yong) you will feel cold Mil ; also bsér-mo (bser mo) adj. or sbst.; *ser-mo* (*ser mo*)
